## Checklist
- [ ] Small, reversible change (scoped files only)
- [ ] `npm run verify` passes locally (attach summary)
- [ ] If UI behavior changed: validated in Browser MCP (no console errors)
- [ ] No new deps OR rationale provided
- [ ] No secrets; `.env` used; logs redacted
- [ ] Docs updated (`docs/…`, `README`, `.env.example` if needed)
